ddls:
CREATE TABLE "allocation_strategies" (
  "strategy_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each allocation strategy */,
  "strategy_name" TEXT /* Name of the allocation strategy */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the allocation strategy */,
  "plot_type" TEXT /* Type of plot or visualization for the strategy */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the strategy was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the strategy */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who created the strategy */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who last updated the strategy */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the strategy (e.g., active, deprecated) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("strategy_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cost_analysis" (
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cost analysis entry */,
  "strategy_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the allocation strategy */,
  "mean_costper" REAL /* Mean cost per unit for the strategy */,
  "median_costper" REAL /* Median cost per unit for the strategy */,
  "q025_costper" REAL /* 2.5th percentile cost per unit for the strategy */,
  "q975_costper" REAL /* 97.5th percentile cost per unit for the strategy */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the cost analysis was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the cost analysis */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who created the cost analysis */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who last updated the cost analysis */,
  "strategy_version" TEXT /* Version of the strategy used for this analysis */,
  "analysis_period" TEXT /* Time period over which the analysis was conducted */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analysis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cost_analysis_strategy_id FOREIGN KEY ("strategy_id") REFERENCES allocation_strategies ("strategy_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "plots" (
  "plot_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each plot */,
  "strategy_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the allocation strategy */,
  "plot_type" TEXT /* Type of plot (e.g., untargeted, case-logistics optimized) */,
  "plot_file_path" TEXT /* File path to the plot image */,
  "plot_description" TEXT /* Description of the plot */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the plot was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the plot */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who created the plot */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who last updated the plot */,
  "plot_version" TEXT /* Version of the plot */,
  "analysis_period" TEXT /* Time period over which the plot was generated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("plot_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_plots_strategy_id FOREIGN KEY ("strategy_id") REFERENCES allocation_strategies ("strategy_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., operations manager, data analyst, executive) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the user account */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who created the user account */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who last updated the user account */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user account (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cost analysis data being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the access log was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the access log */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who created the access log */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who last updated the access log */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used for access (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_analysis_id FOREIGN KEY ("analysis_id") REFERENCES cost_analysis ("analysis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric */,
  "strategy_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the allocation strategy */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the performance metric */,
  "metric_value" REAL /* Value of the performance metric */,
  "metric_unit" TEXT /* Unit of the performance metric */,
  "metric_description" TEXT /* Description of the performance metric */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the performance metric was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the performance metric */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who created the performance metric */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who last updated the performance metric */,
  "metric_version" TEXT /* Version of the metric */,
  "analysis_period" TEXT /* Time period over which the metric was measured */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_strategy_id FOREIGN KEY ("strategy_id") REFERENCES allocation_strategies ("strategy_id")
)
